utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I can not believe this . Do you think that your parents could help pay for it ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I do not know , my mother spent most of her money on her fourth wedding .

emotion_cause.span: 2_my mother spent most of her money on her fourth wedding .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: She is saving the rest for her divorce .

emotion_cause.span: 3_She is saving the rest for her divorce .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: And any extra cash my father has he saves for his yearly trips to ... Dollywood .

emotion_cause.span: 4_any extra cash my father has he saves for his yearly trips to ... Dollywood .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: My parents spent the money for our wedding !

emotion_cause.span: 6_My parents spent the money for our wedding !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: My God ! What did you order ? !

emotion_cause.span: 6_My parents spent the money for our wedding !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Wait , but there is no money ! Well this is terrible ! You guys are gonna have to get married in like a , rec . center !

emotion_cause.span: 8_there is no money ! Well this is terrible ! You guys are gonna have to get married in like a , rec . center !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Honey , it is gonna be okay .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: No ! No it is not ! It is not gonna be okay ! It sucks ! No swing band ! No lilies !

emotion_cause.span: 10_It is not gonna be okay ! It sucks ! No swing band ! No lilies !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I mean you do not have to have this rustic Italian feast .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: And ... and you do not need , you do not need this custom ... made , empire ... waisted , duchess , satin gown . You can wear off the rack .
